title: hieracium pannosum subsp. parnasidis
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. parnasidis is a type of flowering plant species, commonly known as hawkweed, belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium pannosum subsp. parnasidis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin irritations and internally to support overall health and well-being.
